title: Delicate Shattering German Almond Bowl
description: A traditional German dish featuring almonds, cooked in a clay pot and served in a Korean brass bowl, with a delicate shattering texture and jammy flavor, this ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly solo dinner is perfect for a quiet evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the sliced almonds, clay pot cooking oil, chopped onion, and minced garlic.
Transfer the almond mixture to a Korean brass bowl and cook in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the oven and stir in the jam, honey, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Return the bowl to the oven and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the mixture is hot and the almonds are lightly toasted.
Remove the bowl from the oven and sprinkle the chopped fresh parsley over the top.
Serve the Delicate Shattering German Almond Bowl hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
To achieve the delicate shattering texture, allow the dish to cool slightly before serving, then break it apart gently with a fork.
Enjoy your delicious and traditional German dish, perfect for a solo dinner or special occasion.
